Description:
Ballistic of high explosive (self-destroying) tracer rounds fired from Type 71 20mm anti-aircraft autocannon. Designed in 1965 and accepted in 1971. 

Muzzle Velocity:			1010 m/s
Charge:			0.055 kg 5/7 High Nitration
Web: 0.58-0.65 mm, Perforation Diameter: 0.15-0.25 mm, Length: 3.9-4.3 mm
Max Pressure:			2900-3150 kgf/cm² from copper crusher gauge
Barrel Length:			16.58 dm
Gun Length:			17.96 dm (inclusive muzzle device)
Chamber Length:			2.16 dm
Recoil Length:			6-10 mm
Rate of Fire:			500 RPM
Combat Weight:			250 kg (incl. ammo)
Feed:			40 rnd. drum magazine
Chambrage:			1.0
Projectile i43:			1.182

References:
- 1971年式20毫米高射机关炮，《国产火炮手册 说明部分》，兵器工业部第二管理局，1982
